$model
JAGS model:

model {
  # Structural equations

  for (i in 1:N) {
    mu_y[i] <- alpha_y + beta_y_x1*x1[i] + beta_y_x2*x2[i]
  }
  # Multivariate normal likelihoods
  for (i in 1:N) {
    y[i] ~ dnorm(mu_y[i], tau_e_y)
    log_lik_y[i] <- logdensity.norm(y[i], mu_y[i], tau_e_y)
  }
  # Priors for structural parameters
  alpha_y ~ dnorm(0, 1.0E-6)
  tau_e_y ~ dgamma(1, 1)
  sigmay <- 1/sqrt(tau_e_y)
  beta_y_x1 ~ dnorm(0, 1.0E-6)
  beta_y_x2 ~ dnorm(0, 1.0E-6)
}
